title: FinancialAssistance
description: A financial-assistance or coverage program offered by NYC Health + Hospitals — the sliding-scale fee schedule (Options / HHC Options), NYC Care (the guaranteed-access program for New Yorkers who cannot get insurance), financial counseling, and Medicaid/insurance enrollment help. H+H is the safety-net system, so this is a first-class entity. No FHIR analogue and no Open Data twin; today it is HTML-only on the bot-walled site plus in-person financial counseling.

eligibilitySummary.description: Plain-language eligibility summary (e.g. income thresholds, residency, immigration-status-blind).

immigrationStatusBlind.description: Whether eligibility is available regardless of immigration status (true for NYC Care and the sliding scale).
